title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 268.061 - Copies of record furnished — additional copies, fee
text:
268.061.  Copies of record furnished — additional copies, fee. — As soon as the brand is recorded by the director, he shall furnish the owner thereof with two certified copies of the record of the brand.  Additional certified copies may be obtained by the payment of ten dollars for each copy.
(L. 1971 H.B. 134 § 6)
